more.title: Exxaro’s 37% road cost premium may raise margin pressure for South Africa’s manganese exporters
more.description: South Africa’s manganese exporters may lose margin before their ore reaches port if too much volume continues to move by truck instead of rail. Exxaro recently said road haulage costs 37% more than rail, while logistics account for 43% of free-on-board (FOB) export costs. FOB refers to the cost of moving cargo up to the ...
